keyState.blocked_reason: awaiting new pricing tier from vendor

messages.content: Mixed-state day. 4 active threads (design tokens, incident post-mortem, OKR planning, Sidekiq->Temporal), 2 completed (legacy admin decom, R2 static migration), 1 blocked (LLM vendor renegotiation). Status on each, especially the blocked one.
Design tokens 2.0 status?
Version 2.0.1 published to github.com/moltaicorp/design-tokens. Storybook at https://storybook.moltaicorp.com shows all components updated.
Incident post-mortem — id?
INC-2026-05-08-001. Duration 47 minutes. RCA at https://docs.moltaicorp.com/incidents/INC-2026-05-08-001.
Q2 OKRs sheet?
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xyz-okr-q2-2026. Weekly review Tuesday 10am MT.
Temporal migration target?
Namespace molt-prod, endpoint temporal.moltaicorp.com:7233. Sidekiq EOL 2026-07-15.
Legacy admin dashboard decom — done?
Done. Decommissioned 2026-04-30. DNS old-admin.moltaicorp.com retired.
Static assets on R2 — done?
Done. Bucket moltai-static-assets in account cf-account-2026-05. Custom domain cdn.moltaicorp.com.
LLM vendor renegotiation — status?
Blocked on vendor pricing. Anthropic Enterprise Agreement renewal deadline 2026-06-30. Current spend $42,000/mo, target $28,000/mo.
Adoption?
60% of components migrated to design-tokens 2.0.1. Remainder this sprint.
Action items tracked?
Yes, 4 action items in the RCA at https://docs.moltaicorp.com/incidents/INC-2026-05-08-001. All tied back to incident INC-2026-05-08-001.
Cadence locked?
Locked. Weekly Tuesday 10am MT review of OKRs in https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xyz-okr-q2-2026.
Workflows ported?
About 30% so far. Sidekiq EOL is 2026-07-15. Endpoint temporal.moltaicorp.com:7233 in namespace molt-prod is target for all of them.
Anyone still hitting it?
No traffic on old-admin.moltaicorp.com since 2026-04-30 cutover. Marked completed.
Old S3 origin retired?
Yes — all traffic on cdn.moltaicorp.com via R2 bucket moltai-static-assets. S3 origin removed. Marked completed.
Why blocked?
Awaiting new pricing tier from vendor. Finance lead finance-lead@moltaicorp.com is driving. Renewal deadline is 2026-06-30, current $42,000/mo, target $28,000/mo.
